items.headline: Tinalo ng AMD Q1 2026 print ang consensus (May 5)
items.diff_narrative: **Updated: Tinalo ng AMD Q1 2026 print ang consensus — Q1 revenue $10.25B (vs $9.85B consensus, +38% YoY); adjusted EPS $1.37 (vs $1.27 consensus); Data Center $5.78B (+57% YoY) sa itaas ng $5.56B Street; non-GAAP gross margin 55%; Q2 guidance $11.2B vs Street $10.52B (+50.6% YoY sa midpoint); idineklara ni Lisa Su ang Data Center bilang "primary driver of revenue and earnings growth"; AMD shares +4.4% AH** — Ang report kahapon ay may print preview (consensus $1.28 / $9.88B, ang China-cliff $390M sa $100M, Cathie Wood ARK trim). Ngayon, malinis na lumampas ang print sa bar na may Q2 guide print bilang operative buyside catalyst; ang MI308 China cliff ay nasa rearview na at ang Helios + MI400 + MI450 ramp ang forward signal.

items.headline: Anthropic 10-agent financial-services launch (May 5)
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: Anthropic 10-agent financial-services launch — unang single-day frontier-lab vertical-agent product drop na may 10 prebuilt agents (pitch builder, meeting preparer, earnings reviewer, model builder, market researcher, valuation reviewer, GL reconciler, month-end closer, statement auditor, KYC screener) sa Claude Opus 4.7 (64.37% sa Vals AI Finance Agent benchmark, state-of-the-art); native M365 add-ins na sumasaklaw sa Excel + PowerPoint + Word; bagong MCP connectors lumapag para sa Dun & Bradstreet, Fiscal AI, Financial Modeling Prep, Guidepoint, IBISWorld, SS&C IntraLinks, Third Bridge, Verisk; dinadala ng Moody's MCP app ang credit ratings + 600M+ public/private company data nang native sa Claude; testimonials = Citadel, BNY, Carlyle, Mizuho, Travelers, Walleye Capital** — Sinubaybayan ng report kahapon ang Anthropic + Wall Street JV bilang equity-template move; ang vertical-agent launch ngayon ang consumer-facing edge ng parehong monetization push at pinatutunayan ang JV-template thesis sa loob ng parehong linggo.

items.headline: FIS x Anthropic AML Financial Crimes AI Agent (May 4 BusinessWire)
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: FIS x Anthropic AML Financial Crimes AI Agent — unang Tier-1 banking-platform vendor + frontier-lab joint product na may regulatory-grade audit trail; nag-ship ang FIS (powers ~12% ng global economy) ng Financial Crimes AI Agent na nag-co-compress ng AML alert + case investigations mula sa araw patungong minuto sa pamamagitan ng auto-assembling evidence sa kabuuan ng core systems ng bangko, sinusuri ang activity laban sa kilalang typologies, sinasakyang ang highest-risk cases para sa pagsusuri; binabawasan ang SAR false positives + pinagbubuti ang narrative quality; BMO + Amalgamated Bank ang first deployment customers, broader availability targeted H2 2026; Anthropic Applied AI team + forward-deployed engineers naka-embed sa FIS; ang client data ay nananatili sa loob ng FIS-controlled infrastructure** — Ang report kahapon ay walang FIS coverage. Ang drop ngayon ay nakakapares sa Anthropic 10-agent launch bilang banking-vertical pincer move: pag-aari ng FIS ang core-banking distribution rail, pag-aari ng Anthropic ang model + agent harness.

items.headline: Cisco $400M Astrix Security acquisition (May 4)
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: Cisco $400M Astrix Security acquisition — unang major networking-vendor M&A sa agent-identity / non-human-identity (NHI) control-plane primitive; nagdi-discover + nagpapamahala ang Astrix (itinatag noong 2021 ng Unit 8200 vets na sina Alon Jackson + Idan Gour) ng API keys, service accounts, OAuth tokens, machine-to-machine credentials na ginagamit ngayon ng AI agents sa malaking sukat; integration sa Cisco Identity Intelligence, Cisco Secure Access, Duo IAM; Cisco enterprise survey = 85% nag-eeksperimento sa AI agents ngunit 5% lamang sa production; AI agents + non-human identities ay mas marami kaysa sa human users sa ratio na ~100:1** — Ang report kahapon ay may Microsoft Agent 365 + Cisco DefenseClaw RSAC stack ngunit walang M&A sa NHI category; muling binubuo ng ngayon ang agent-identity convergence bilang Cisco + Microsoft + Astrix three-vendor lockstep sa loob ng isang linggo at ginagawang explicit M&A primitive ang NHI.

items.headline: Cloudflare Infire LLM inference engine launch
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: Cloudflare Infire LLM inference engine — naglabas ang Rust-based custom inference engine ng Cloudflare sa kabuuan ng global edge network, naghihiwalay sa input-processing + output-generation papasok sa magkaibang optimized systems (prefill/decode disaggregation); 7% mas mabilis kaysa sa vLLM 0.10.0 sa unloaded H100 NVL machines, mas mabuti sa ilalim ng real load; tumutok sa pagse-serve ng mas maraming requests na may mas kaunting GPUs at mas mababang CPU overhead; nakakapares sa nakatayong SGLang vs vLLM 29% throughput gap sa H100** — Sinusubaybayan ng report kahapon ang SGLang vs vLLM Pareto-split bilang two-engine choice. Ngayon, idinaragdag ang ikatlong inference-engine candidate na may edge-network distribution bilang differentiator at muling binubuo ang production-serving choice bilang three-way Pareto.

items.headline: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 patched (Apr 24 fix carry)
items.diff_narrative: **Updated: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 patched — CVSS 9.8 RCE sa pamamagitan ng /v1/rerank endpoint na may malicious GGUF model file; jinja2.Environment() na walang sandboxing ang root cause; nirerekomenda ng CERT/CC mitigation guidance ang ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment; iniulat ni Stuart Beck + idini-disclose Apr 20 sa pamamagitan ng CERT/CC; **lumapag ang fix commit Apr 24, jinja2.Environment pinalitan ng ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment**; supply-chain risk vector = malicious GGUF na ipinamamahagi sa pamamagitan ng model repositories** — Ang report kahapon ay may CVE sa ~15 araw unpatched bilang pinakamatagal-tumatakbong 2026 LLM-tooling CVE category. Sinasara ng ngayon ang disclosure-to-fix window na may patch na nakumpirma sa NVD detail; hindi na nagdadala ang agentic-AI vulnerability disclosure regime ng bukas na critical.

items.headline: NVIDIA Blackwell B200 hyperscaler deployment scale (May 2026)
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: NVIDIA Blackwell B200 hyperscaler deployment scale — major cloud providers nagde-deploy ng ~1,000 NVL72 racks per week (bawat isa = 72 Blackwell GPUs configured para sa inference throughput); B200 on-demand rental ~$6.04/hr noong May 2026 vs $6.45/hr May 2025 (~6% YoY decline, modest vs steeper analyst forecasts); nag-pre-allocate ang NVIDIA ng halos lahat ng B200 production hanggang Q2 2026 na may hyperscaler priority (Microsoft, Google, Amazon, Meta); ibinaba ng B200 architecture ang cost per million tokens 15x vs prior generation (~2c per million tokens sa GPT-OSS-120B)** — Ang report kahapon ay walang NVIDIA deployment-scale numbers. Ngayon, pinares ang ~1,000 NVL72 racks/wk quantification sa AMD Q1 print kaya ang two-vendor AI-accelerator duopoly disclosure shape ay may parehong sides sa public record sa parehong araw.

items.headline: arxiv reasoning-agent + inference-efficiency wave (May 3-5)
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: arxiv reasoning-agent wave — May 3 paper na "Enhanced LLM Reasoning by Optimizing Reward Functions with Search-Driven Reinforcement Learning" (arxiv 2605.02073) ay tumutrato sa reward specification mismo bilang object ng optimization para sa RL-improved reasoning; kasama sa May 5 submissions ang "EngiAgent: Fully Connected Coordination of LLM Agents for Solving Open-ended Engineering Problems" + "DeGenTWeb: A First Look at LLM-dominant Websites"; ang "From Laboratory to Real-World Applications: Benchmarking Agentic Code Reasoning at the Repository Level" (arxiv 2601.03731) ay nagbe-benchmark ng repository-level reasoning sa kabuuan ng massive interdependent file systems; tumutok ang TRACES + PLP (Progressive Length Prediction) papers sa adaptive early-stopping para sa cost-efficient LRM inference** — Ang report kahapon ay walang fresh arxiv coverage sa reasoning/agent track. Ang 3-day window ngayon ay nagpapakita ng multi-paper convergence sa RL-driven reasoning + agentic coordination + adaptive inference-time scaling.
